creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Druzenko from comment #5)

> Can you connect to same hosts using xfreerdp in terminal without Remmina?

For the most recently made connection in Remmina: yes. 

It's functional, but not a useful workaround; I have more than six hundred saved connections, and speed (readiness, through the GUI of Remmina) is of the essence.
